summary: S&P 500 +0.54%, Nasdaq +0.69%, Dow +0.37%, Russell 2000 +2.21% on May 1. Apple +3% on earnings beat pushed S&P above 7,200. April was best month since 2020 for S&P and Nasdaq. Oil fell on Middle East peace-deal hopes.
